diff:
diff --git a/src/qualified.py b/src/qualified.py
index 366e5b0..3f2ab44 100644
--- a/src/qualified.py
+++ b/src/qualified.py
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 def split_qualified_name(name):
     if "." not in name:
         return "", name
-    module, item = name.split(".", 1)
-    return module, item
+    parts = name.rsplit(".", 1)
+    if len(parts) == 1:
+        return "", parts[0]
+    return parts[0], parts[1]
